results.text: Rub the back of your neck when nervous.
Hum a soft, steady tune before a fight.
Stare off into the distance when deep in thought.
Laugh in the face of danger—a sharp, unnerving sound.
Trace the lines of your tattoos when anxious.
Stretch shoulders and crack knuckles before action.
Whisper a soft prayer to the gods before any journey.
Ask too many questions due to boundless curiosity.
Always sharpening any weapon in your hands.
Repeat key phrases when trying to convince someone.
Back is always to the wall in crowded spaces.
Inspect every nook and cranny of a room.
Touch tree trunks or stones to feel the texture.
Always keep a bit of food tucked away.
Study people's expressions carefully.
Leave a small offering for the gods wherever you go.
Squint eyes when judging someone's character.
Run fingers through hair when a problem tugs at your mind.
Tapping a steady rhythm with fingers when thinking.
Greet animals with a slight bow of the head.
